programs.title: 48 Hours
programs.desc: Decades after 16-year-old Molly Bish vanished, her sister turns to TikTok for answers.

programs.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programs.desc: A single mother gets along with her handyman neighbor, until she gets a new man in her life and her neighbor adopts more than 50 dogs; accusations become threats, threats become attacks and, eventually, the conflict reaches a bloody conclusion.

programs.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programs.desc: A woman becomes the target of her overly flirtatious neighbor after her husband dies; the woman's brother moves in to protect her and is put on a collision course with the the neighbor that will be resolved with bloodshed.

programs.title: 48 Hours on ID
programs.sub_title: Death at the Front Door - Who Shot Heidi Firkus?
programs.desc: Heidi Firkus calls 911 after her husband claims an intruder is breaking into their Minnesota home; Heidi ends up dead, and the case remains cold for 10 long years until a new investigator takes a fresh look.

programs.title: 48 Hours on ID
programs.sub_title: Kristen Trickle Autopsy of the Mind
programs.desc: First responders find Kristen Trickle clinging to life and attempt CPR, but she does not survive; the coroner rules her death a suicide, but police and prosecutors are skeptical and charge her husband with murder.

programs.title: 48 Hours on ID
programs.desc: After her husband dies of an apparent overdose, Kouri Richins writes a children's book about grief; she's charged with his murder.
